evidence.quote_or_summary: There are two distinct seasons for the Khopra Ridge trek – April (Spring) and October (Autumn).

values: Spring is moist; Autumn is dry and crisp
Spring has slightly warmer daytime temperatures than Autumn
Spring may have hard snow patches at higher altitudes; Autumn has no snow on the trek
Spring is when winter has just left the slopes with snow patches above 12,000 feet

evidence.quote_or_summary: Even the air is different. While Spring is moist, Autumn is dry and crisp.
In Spring, although you will find patches of hard snow at higher altitudes, the temperature during the day will be slightly warmer than that in Autumn, when there won’t be any snow on the trek.
It’s that time of the year when winter has left the slopes. But, you will still find snow patches on the ground above 12,000 feet.

values: Snow patches may be present on the trail in Spring (April) above 12,000 feet
No snow on the trek in Autumn (October)

evidence.quote_or_summary: Presence of snow: You may find snow patches on the trail.
Presence of snow: You will not find snow at this time of the year.
you will still find snow patches on the ground above 12,000 feet.

values: Spring: rain can occur if clouds cover the sun, dropping temperatures to around 15 °C
Autumn: rain or slight drizzle can occur and brings down daytime temperature by a few degrees

evidence.quote_or_summary: During the day if the sun goes behind the clouds and there is about of rain, then the temperature can fall to around 15 °C.
But any rain or slight drizzle brings down the temperature by a few degrees.

values: Spring (April) nighttime: 10 °C to 5 °C, dipping to almost zero
Autumn (October) nighttime: 5 °C to -5 °C, dipping to 0 °C in October

evidence.quote_or_summary: Day time: Between 20 °C and 24 °C | Night time: Will drop to temperatures between 10 °C and 5 °C.
In Spring, expect pleasant daytime temperatures around 20 °C. But at night it dips to almost zero levels.
Day time: Between 15 °C and 18 °C | Night time: Will drop to temperatures between 5 °C and -5 °C.
Nights in Autumn get chilly. In October the temperature dips to 0° C.

values: Autumn: keep a jacket handy due to rain/drizzle cooling
Spring: rain under cloud cover can drop daytime temperature to ~15 °C

evidence.quote_or_summary: No. of warm layers required: 3 warm layers
No. of warm layers required: 4 warm layers
So keep a jacket handy with you always.
During the day if the sun goes behind the clouds and there is about of rain, then the temperature can fall to around 15 °C.
